notes: Audited /skills/{invoice,pay,compliance,receipt,reputation,errors}.md. All 19 distinct codes appearing in per-skill Errors tables are a strict subset of the 25-code master catalogue in errors.md (master additionally lists internal_error, invalid_credentials, mandate_creation_failed, missing_idempotency_key, rpc_upstream_error, transaction_not_found — extras, not drift). Ran 5 live probes: POST /v1/invoices (no body) -> 401 auth_required; POST /v1/pay (no auth) -> 401 auth_required; POST /v1/compliance/check (garbage JSON) -> 400 validation_error; GET /v1/receipts/xyz (no auth) -> 401 auth_required; POST /v1/auth/siwe/verify (garbage) -> 400 validation_error. Both observed codes (auth_required, validation_error) appear in both the respective skill's Errors table and in the master catalogue. All error responses follow RFC 9457 application/problem+json with type/title/status/code/detail/instance/request_id/agent_action fields. No drift remains. Note: skill frontmatter does not use an explicit errors:[] array; codes are documented in body Errors tables — interpreted as skill-file-scoped documentation, which is consistent.
